source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/ASNZS_60-SIPT_60-2230C/ASNZS 4268 2017_5G_B1-3_ST60-2230C_AR740701-11AN.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: AS/NZS 4268:2017 supplementary test report for Laird Connectivity ST60-2230C 802.11ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents test evaluation and compliance results for the EUT against AS/NZS 4268:2017 and EN 301 893 V2.1.1 requirements.
keyPoints: Report No. AR740701-11AN, Rev. 01, initial issue dated Feb. 25, 2021.
The tested sample was evaluated and declared in compliance with the requirement of AS/NZS 4268:2017.
The report is supplementary to original ICC report no. AR740701-03AI.
Model ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final test data.

Summary test results list pass outcomes for carrier frequencies, emission bandwidth, RF output power/TPC, power density, unwanted emissions, receiver spurious emissions, DFS, adaptivity, receiver blocking, and user access restrictions.

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

concepts.name: 5 GHz RLAN Bands
concepts.evidence: Transmitter Unwanted Emissions outside the 5 GHz RLAN Bands

concepts.name: RF Output Power and Transmit Power Control
concepts.pageTarget: RF Output Power and Transmit Power Control
concepts.evidence: RF Output Power, Transmit Power Control (TPC) and Power density

concepts.name: Dynamic Frequency Selection
concepts.evidence: Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Adaptivity
concepts.evidence: Adaptivity (Channel Access Mechanism) Meet the requirement of limit. PassNote2

concepts.name: Receiver Blocking
concepts.evidence: Receiver Blocking Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: The document is Report No. AR740701-11AN, Rev. 01.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: AR740701-11AN Page : 1 of 263 Report Version: Rev. 01

evidence.claim: The report was initially issued on Feb. 25, 2021.
evidence.evidenceText: Release Record Report No. Version Description Issued Date AR740701-11AN Rev. 01 Initial issue Feb. 25, 2021

evidence.claim: The equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n M.2 2230 + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
The model number tested is ST60-2230C.
The applicant is Laird Connectivity, Inc.
Testing applied standards include AS/NZS 4268:2017 and EN 301 893 V2.1.1 (2017-05).
evidence.evidenceText: According to the specifications of the manufacturer, the EUT must comply with the requirements of the following standards: AS/NZS 4268:2017 EN 301 893 V2.1.1 (2017-05)

evidence.claim: International Certification Corp. declared the tested sample evaluated and in compliance with the stated standards.
evidence.evidenceText: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

evidence.claim: The report is supplementary to original ICC report no. AR740701-03AI.
evidence.evidenceText: This report is issued as a supplementary report to original ICC report no. AR740701-03AI.

evidence.claim: The supplementary changes did not impact original test results.
evidence.evidenceText: After verification, above changes does not impact to original test results. Thus test results remain the same.

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The summary test result for RF output power and TPC passed.
evidence.evidenceText: RF Output Power & Transmit Power Control (TPC) 5.15-5.25GHz: 22.87 dBm 5.25-5.35GHz: 22.76 dBm 5.47-5.725GHz: 22.89 dBm Pass
evidence.pageTarget: RF Output Power and Transmit Power Control

evidence.claim: Geo-location capability testing was not required because the device does not support the function.
evidence.evidenceText: Geo-location capability This test is not required since the device does not support this function NA

evidence.claim: DFS measurement was recorded in Report No. AD740701-11.
evidence.evidenceText: The DFS measurement was recorded in Report No.: AD740701-11.

evidence.claim: Channel Access Mechanism and maximum Channel Occupancy Time were declared compliant by the manufacturer and not evaluated.
evidence.evidenceText: Channel Access Mechanism and maximum Channel Occupancy Time are declared compliance with requirement by manufacturer. Both items are not evaluated.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the document references AS/NZS 4268:2017 and ACMA 4268 clauses, but does not present an issuing regulatory authority.
Some emissions result pages appear to contain plot or table images with little extracted numeric OCR text, limiting detailed traceability for those measurements.
ProductSignal metadata is Unclassified although the source text identifies Laird Connectivity ST60-2230C module models.
